root_text.sn35.72:1.1: “Yo hi koci, bhikkhave, bhikkhu channaṁ phassāyatanānaṁ samudayañca atthaṅgamañca assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca yathābhūtaṁ nappajānāti.
root_text.sn35.72:1.2: Avusitaṁ tena brahmacariyaṁ, ārakā so imasmā dhammavinayā”ti.
root_text.sn35.72:2.1: Evaṁ vutte, aññataro bhikkhu bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn35.72:2.3: Ahañhi, bhante, channaṁ phassāyatanānaṁ samudayañca atthaṅgamañca assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca yathābhūtaṁ nappajānāmī”ti.
root_text.sn35.72:3.2: cakkhuṁ ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti samanupassasī”ti?
root_text.sn35.72:5.1: “Sādhu, bhikkhu, ettha ca te, bhikkhu, cakkhu ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi na meso attā’ti evametaṁ yathābhūtaṁ sammappaññāya sudiṭṭhaṁ bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.72:5.2: Evaṁ te etaṁ paṭhamaṁ phassāyatanaṁ pahīnaṁ bhavissati āyatiṁ apunabbhavāya …pe….
root_text.sn35.72:6.1: “Jivhaṁ ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti samanupassasī”ti?
root_text.sn35.72:8.1: “Sādhu, bhikkhu, ettha ca te, bhikkhu, jivhā ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi na meso attā’ti evametaṁ yathābhūtaṁ sammappaññāya sudiṭṭhaṁ bhavissati. Evaṁ te etaṁ catutthaṁ phassāyatanaṁ pahīnaṁ bhavissati āyatiṁ apunabbhavāya …pe….
root_text.sn35.72:9.1: “Manaṁ ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti samanupassasī”ti?
root_text.sn35.72:11.1: “Sādhu, bhikkhu, ettha ca te, bhikkhu, mano ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti evametaṁ yathābhūtaṁ sammappaññāya sudiṭṭhaṁ bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.72:11.2: Evaṁ te etaṁ chaṭṭhaṁ phassāyatanaṁ pahīnaṁ bhavissati āyatiṁ apunabbhavāyā”ti.

translation_text.sn35.72:1.1: “Mendicants, anyone who doesn’t truly understand the six fields of contact’s origin, disappearance, gratification, drawback, and escape
translation_text.sn35.72:1.2: has not completed the spiritual journey and is far from this teaching and training.”
translation_text.sn35.72:2.1: When he said this, one of the mendicants said to the Buddha,
translation_text.sn35.72:2.3: For I don’t truly understand the six fields of contact’s origin, disappearance, gratification, drawback, and escape.”
translation_text.sn35.72:3.2: Do you regard the eye like this: ‘This is not mine, I am not this, this is not my self’?”
translation_text.sn35.72:5.1: “Good, mendicant! And regarding the eye, you will truly see clearly with right wisdom that: ‘This is not mine, I am not this, this is not my self.’
translation_text.sn35.72:5.2: In this way you will give up the first field of contact, so that there are no more future lives.
translation_text.sn35.72:6.1: Do you regard the ear … nose … tongue … body …
translation_text.sn35.72:9.1: Do you regard the mind like this: ‘This is not mine, I am not this, this is not my self’?”
translation_text.sn35.72:11.1: “Good, mendicant! And regarding the mind, you will truly see clearly with right wisdom that: ‘This is not mine, I am not this, this is not my self.’
translation_text.sn35.72:11.2: In this way you will give up the sixth field of contact, so that there are no more future lives.”
